[diff_block_start]
@@ -51,4 +51,38 @@
 
 - **Client TypeScript Compile Check**: Verified using `npx tsc --noEmit`. Compiles 100% cleanly with zero errors.
 - **Admin Production Bundle Check**: Verified using `npm run build` under `App_admin`. Compiles and bundles 100% cleanly without errors.
+
+---
+
+## Admin Orders Panel UI/UX Overhaul
+
+We have completely redesigned and polished the **Orders Manager** admin section to address styling shortcomings, layout overlapping, and poor interactive capabilities. The dashboard has been elevated into a premium, highly functional administrative command center:
+
+### 1. Glassmorphic Modal & Floating Overlay Drawer
+- Developed a high-fidelity dialog container using an elevated, dark-gradient background with a glowing frosted glass texture (`backdrop-filter: blur(10px)`).
+- Added smooth scale-up slide-in animations for a premium micro-interaction experience.
+- Refactored the raw close button into a rounded, rotating button that shifts to danger red on hover, offering a distinct visual boundary.
+
+### 2. High-Efficiency Responsive Grid Layout
+- Converted overlapping and squashed browser flow layouts into a responsive two-column grid (`300px` left sidebar and flexible right content area) that collapses cleanly on smaller screens.
+- **Left Sidebar**: Keeps focus on core devotee profiles, join history, and action status dropdowns.
+- **Right Content Area**: Organizes heavy Vedic Sankalp datasets and Prasad Shipping coordinates in well-spaced, aligned grid segments.
+- **Sankalp & Shipping Coordinates**: Fixed the browser-default inline span merging bug (e.g. `Recipient NameSahil` or `Pincode556988`) by making labels block elements, s
<truncated 188 bytes>
cut (`tel:`) linked directly to the customer's registered phone.
+- **Devotee WhatsApp Sync**: Integrated a WhatsApp shortcut button that automatically cleans phone formats (e.g. removing symbols to support global numbers) and pre-fills a personalized greeting including the devotee's name and exact order reference number.
+- **Print Address Copy Utility**: Built a dynamic address copying block. When clicked, it compiles the recipient's Full Name, Phone, Street, City, State, Pincode, and Landmark into a beautifully structured, standard mailing label block, copied directly to the clipboard for fast label printing.
+- **Copy Order ID**: Placed inline copy buttons next to the order UUID for fast lookup queries.
+
+### 4. Dynamic Product Title & Image Mapping
+- **Local Hardcoded Dictionary**: Handled static/mock IDs (e.g. `rec_1`, `add_1`, `p4`) by mapping them to beautiful titles (e.g. `Panch Mewa Prasad Box`, `Aromatic Kapur Tablets`).
+- **Dynamic Database Pre-Fetching**: Configured the component to fetch the master catalog from `website_pooja_products` on startup and cache the mapping. The system automatically resolves dynamic product UUIDs into their actual storefront names (e.g. custom user additions) instead of raw hash IDs.
+
+### 5. Harmonious Theme Badge Indicators
+- Replaced unstyled monochrome texts with glowing, color-coded badge systems representing specific fulfillment and ledger states:
+  - **Fulfillment**: Pending (soft orange), Confirmed (teal), Processing (purple), Shipped (blue), Delivered/Completed (emerald green), Cancelled (danger red).
+  - **Payment**: Pending (soft yellow), Completed (success green), Failed (danger red), Refunded (gray-indigo).
+  - **Order Type**: Puja Seva (orange outline), Product (blue outline), Mixed Order (purple outline).
+
 
[diff_block_end]

Please note that the above snippet only shows the MODIFIED lines from the last change. It shows up to 3 lines of unchanged lines before and after the modified lines. The actual file contents may have many more lines not shown.
